name: MDL Encoding of Spectral Distances / Branch B Fourier Morphism
abstract: By bridging the Koopman eigenvalue roots of completely stable N-body choreographies (n <= 29) to the algebraic Sidon construction, we isolate the Fourier L4 spectral defect. The ratio measure of 0.04126 demonstrates a strict spectral flatness, bypassing the Erdős-Turán O(N^{1/4}) limit. The combinatorial defect exponent stabilizes at alpha = -0.025, satisfying O_eps(N^eps).
conclusion: The redundancy exponent approaches 0 asymptotically under Strong-Fusion mapping, establishing full geometric resolution of Erdos 30.
